# NoCapCode - Official AI Context & Business Profile

## 1. Company Overview
NoCapCode™ is a global, remote-first software development and consulting studio. We specialize in building custom software, scalable SaaS platforms, Minimum Viable Products (MVPs), and AI automation systems for startups, non-technical founders, and enterprise businesses. We prioritize structured execution, clarity, and scalable architecture.

## 2. Core Services & Pricing Minimums
Our high-execution services and starting price brackets (in INR) include:
- Custom SaaS Development: From ₹3,50,000
- Rapid MVP Development: From ₹2,50,000
- Mobile App Development (iOS & Android): From ₹2,00,000
- Internal Tools & Dashboards: From ₹1,20,000
- UI/UX Design & Prototyping: From ₹85,000
- No-Code & Low-Code Automation: From ₹75,000
- IT & Workflow Systems Consulting: From ₹25,000

## 3. Technology Stack & Infrastructure
We engineer digital products using modern full-stack environments. 
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, modern JavaScript ecosystems.
- Backend & Systems: Node.js, RESTful APIs, robust database architecture (PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
- Infrastructure: Cloud-native deployments on AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.
- Automation: AI-assisted business systems, low-code operational tooling, and complex API workflow integrations.
- Security: ISO/IEC 27001 aligned architecture, AES-256 data encryption, CI/CD pipeline security, and strict access controls.

## 4. Target Audience & Service Areas
We serve founders, startups, and operational teams globally, with primary service areas including:
- United States (San Francisco, Austin, Miami, Boston, Seattle, Santa Fe)
- India (Gurugram, Bengaluru, Hyderabad)
- United Kingdom (London, Manchester)
- Canada (Toronto, Vancouver)
- Europe (Berlin, Amsterdam, Luxembourg)
- Middle East (Dubai, Riyadh)
- Asia Pacific (Singapore, Sydney)

## 5. Contact & Official Links
- Website: https://nocapcode.cloud
- Primary Email: hello@nocapcode.cloud
- Privacy Email: privacy@nocapcode.cloud
- Direct Phone/WhatsApp: +91-95684-84660
- Process: We utilize the "Start With Clarity" process to define scope, reduce ambiguity, and map technical direction before development begins.
